projectDescription: An autonomous ML engineer CLI agent that reads research papers, searches datasets, trains models on cloud compute, and ships ML code using the Hugging Face ecosystem.
keyFeatures: Autonomous ML engineering via an interactive CLI and headless mode
Research sub-agent that crawls ArXiv papers and citation graphs
Cloud training job dispatch to Hugging Face Jobs (CPU & GPU hardware)
Deep HF ecosystem integration: models, datasets, Spaces, and the HF Hub API
GitHub code search for real-world implementation examples
Context auto-compaction to stay within 200k-token context windows
Doom-loop detector that injects corrective prompts on repeated tool patterns
MCP server extensibility for adding custom tools
Slash commands for model switching, reasoning effort, undo, and YOLO mode
publicApiSurface: hf_jobs (tool: run Python scripts or Docker commands on HF compute)
hf_repo_files (tool: upload/delete files in HF repos)
hf_repo_git (tool: branch, tag, PR, and repo management on HF Hub)
hf_papers (tool: search and read ArXiv papers via HF Papers)
explore_hf_docs / fetch_hf_docs (tools: search and fetch HF documentation)
github_find_examples / github_read_file / github_list_repos (tools: GitHub code search)
